snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

вһӨвһӨ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
вһӨвһӨ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


вһӨвһӨLinks:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5q/?playlist=uad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y

рҹҺө Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

es.title: Destruyendo un Mundo que No Existe
es.description:
Un libro extraГұo aparece en el mundo de Avery advirtiГ©ndole que huya, asГӯ que decide investigar y cazar al autor - el jugador desaparecido d3rlord3. Pero lo que descubre dentro de su mundo es mГЎs de lo que jamГЎs pudo haber imaginado..

Canal de Avery: вҖӘ@averylargemayoвҖ¬ 

Voz de Avery: вҖӘ@andrewgaming677вҖ¬ 
Voz de Abel/El Recipiente: вҖӘ@ZeemythвҖ¬ 

MГҡSICA ORIGINAL POR: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic en instagram)
  / destroying-a-world-that-doesnt  


NO LEAS ABAJO SI NO QUIERES SPOILERS:


Canal de d3rlord3: вҖӘвҖӘ@dhutchins333вҖ¬ 


Esta es solo una pequeГұa parte de la descripciГіn donde hablo sobre el video y hay MUCHO que decir sobre este tipo. La razГіn por la que este video es tan largo es porque originalmente iba a ser en dos partes (una parte 2 y una parte 3) pero el final de la parte 2 era un poco dГ©bil (final del POV de Avery) y sentГӯ que la parte 3 requerirГӯa demasiado contexto. AsГӯ que las combinamos en una sola.

Creo que voy a subir un video completo de detrГЎs de cГЎmaras/escenas eliminadas en mi segundo canal вҖӘ вҖӘ@TwifiesвҖ¬  donde hablo sobre cГіmo se hizo este video/por quГ© se tomaron ciertas decisiones. Pero algo que realmente me gusta son todos los pequeГұos guiГұos a algunas de mis obras de ficciГіn favoritas. Algunos mГЎs explГӯcitos, como en la biblioteca, pero si alguna vez viste Adventure Time entonces esas lГӯneas del Rey deberГӯan sonarte bastante familiares.

Este es fГЎcilmente el video en el que mГЎs tiempo he trabajado y no quiero que vuelva a pasar jaja se siente raro esperar tanto entre subidas. Prometo que pronto volverГ© a la normalidad. Esto o envejece bien o no, pero este video se siente bastante diferente a la parte 1 lo cual me da algo de miedo. Creo que este video en realidad no da tanto miedo, o al menos no estГЎ tan cargado de sustos y puede que haya perdido lo que hacГӯa buena a la parte 1. Pero quiГ©n sabe. Creo que el final estГЎ buenГӯsimo y las escenas mГЎs dГ©biles son (como siempre) las partes donde intentas forzar el miedo. Es decir, la persecuciГіn en la montaГұa, y esa persecuciГіn despuГ©s de que el suelo desaparece debajo de Avery en los edificios grises. Simplemente creo que no puedes forzar el miedo y que la tensiГіn es donde realmente brilla. Pero quiГ©n sabe, he visto este video tantas veces que ya no puedo decirlo con certeza.

Una nota sobre el villano, no pienso en esto como "El Rey de Amarillo" per se, si acaso sigue mГЎs la adaptaciГіn lovecraftiana, Hastur. Pero creo que este tipo es mi propia adaptaciГіn de esa adaptaciГіn. Un Rey x Bill Cipher x The Lich, si eso tiene sentido.

TambiГ©n, si quieres apoyar el proyecto/descargar cualquiera de las construcciones, revГӯsalas aquГӯ. Obtienes cada mundo que aparece aquГӯ + el mundo de la parte 1, todo por $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

TambiГ©n quiero dar las gracias a algunas personas porque sin ellas este video habrГӯa sido completamente imposible. AsГӯ que un enorme gracias a:

Zeemyth por no solo dar voz sino ayudar muchГӯsimo con la escritura de los libros dentro del juego


Horace y todo el equipo de HoraceCreations por ser tan geniales para trabajar y hacer esto posible en primer lugar con sus increГӯbles construcciones


AndrewGaming67 por ser tan flexible y talentoso con la actuaciГіn de voz


Wato y Kenadian por ayudarme con los aspectos mГЎs tГ©cnicos que viste (como el phaseo del bote)


Ben por la mГәsica y por estar tan abierto a ideas y revisiones


Rekrap2 por enviarme esa cosa del shulker en el cielo hace 4 aГұos


Parrot por todos los consejos y por motivarme a seguir haciendo mejores videos


Speedish por grabar conmigo durante horas y horas y aguantar mis revisiones de calidad


TГҡ por ver :) realmente lo aprecio



вһӨвһӨ Twitter: / wifieswastaken  
вһӨвһӨ Discord: / discord  


вһӨвһӨLinks:

Tim Stephenson/El Rey: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephensonвҖҰ

MГҡSICA DE EPIDEMIC QUE USO: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5вҖҰ

рҹҺө MГәsica con derechos de autor licenciada por Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) de George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

Esta NO es una serie llamada Minecraft VVSauce donde exploro funciones aleatorias de Minecraft. No son cosas secretas de Minecraft ni lore de Minecraft (como Game Theory) ni Escape Rooms, sino un video de unfiction sГәper largo y loco donde Averythemayo y d3rlord3 buscan al rey de amarillo? Pero no realmente al rey de amarillo. Si acaso es mГЎs como hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Ni siquiera es un arg pero puedes llamarlo asГӯ. Es solo un video donde las cosas se ponen intensas.

Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]

Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II PHASE 2 - THE LAST BATTLE - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #SCYTES #LF #A1
snippet.description:
WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia returns with a new chapter. 

Top teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Mongolia enter the battlefield to compete in a high-intensity, multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high-pressure fights.

Across multiple days of action, every match will test consistency, teamwork, and decision-making.
Every elimination matters. Every rotation counts. Every moment can change the leaderboard. 

Expect clutch plays, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves.

Only one team will rise above all and be crowned the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now. 

рҹҸҶ PARTICIPATING TEAMS

4THRIVES рҹҮөрҹҮ°
Horaa Esports рҹҮірҹҮө
Alpha Gaming рҹҮІрҹҮі
Twisted Mind рҹҮІрҹҮі
Da Real Soldiers рҹҮірҹҮө
ASI8 Esports рҹҮөрҹҮ°
Loyalty First рҹҮөрҹҮ°
Team SCYTES рҹҮөрҹҮ°
Red Death рҹҮөрҹҮ°
313 Esports рҹҮөрҹҮ°
Phoenix Rise рҹҮөрҹҮ°
MAXEBLES рҹҮөрҹҮ°
A1 RG Esports рҹҮ§рҹҮ©
ZC GSM Esports рҹҮ§рҹҮ©
AMINZ Esports рҹҮөрҹҮ°
Trained to Kill рҹҮірҹҮө
Yonko Jutti рҹҮірҹҮө
Abrupt Slayers рҹҮірҹҮө

вҸ° MATCH START TIME

рҹҮөрҹҮ° Pakistan 03:00 PM
рҹҮірҹҮө Nepal  03:45 PM
рҹҮ§рҹҮ© Bangladesh 04:00 PM
рҹҮІрҹҮі Mongolia 06:00 PM

рҹ“… TOURNAMENT SCHEDULE

рҹ“Ҷ Phase 1: March 24 - March 26
рҹ“Ҷ Phase 2: April 1 - April 3, 2026

18 Teams
6 Matches Per Day
18 Matches Per Phase

The team with the best overall performance across all matches will be crowned the PUBG MOBILE 141 Ultimate Grind Champion.

рҹ’¬ JOIN THE COMMUNITY

snippet.description:

Lyrics:

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Verse 1]
It was a crush
But I couldn't, couldn't get enough
It was a rush
But I gave it up
It was a crush
Now, I might've went and said too much
But that's all it was
So I gave it up

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Verse 2]
It was a crush
I kept sayin', "I'ma stay in touch"
But that thing went bust
So I gave it up, ooh
No tricks, no bluff
I'm just better off without them cuffs
Yeah, the sun won't set on us
Ooh, ooh, ooh, yeah, yeah

[Pre-Chorus]
Went low, went high
Still waters run dry
Gotta get back in the groove
I ain't ever worried
Went low, went high
What matters is now
Gettin' right back in the mood

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Post-Chorus]
Now I've found another crush
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late
Now I've found another crush
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late

[Bridge]
Ooh, ooh-woah
Ooh, ooh-woah

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Post-Chorus]
Now I've found another crush
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late

The lush life's given me a rush

Lyrics

snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (рҹ””) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

https://www.facebook.com/maneskinofficial

Lyrics:

[Intro]
Put your lovin' hand out, baby
'Cause I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out, darlin'

[Verse 1]
Ridin' high when I was king
I played it hard and fast, 'cause I had everything
I walked away, you warned me then
But easy come and easy go and it would end

[Verse 2]
So anytime I bleed, you let me go
Yah, anytime I feed, you get me, no
Anytime I seek, you let me know
But I plant and seed, just let me go
I'm on my knees when I'm beggin'
'Cause I don't wanna lose you
Hey, yeah, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm beggin', beggin' you
Uh, put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you, ah
And put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Verse 3]
I need you to understand
Tried so hard to be your man
The kind of man you want in the end
Only then can I begin to live again

[Verse 4]
An empty shell, I used to be
The shadow of my life was hangin' over me
A broken man that I don't know
Won't even stand the devil's dance to win my soul

[Verse 5]
What we doin'? What we chasin'?
